title: Medical & Pharmaceutical Terminology
description: Master the language of pharmacy. This course builds your fluency in the medical and pharmaceutical terms, abbreviations, and sig codes that appear on every prescription you will ever process.
what_youll_learn: Interpret prescription sig codes and Latin abbreviations accurately
Distinguish between brand, generic, and chemical drug names
Apply medical word-building rules to decode unfamiliar clinical terms
Recognise error-prone abbreviations flagged by safety bodies
Read and verify drug labels against prescriptions using correct terminology
